---
title: "Herd-boy and His Hermit, The"
---

## Herd-boy and His Hermit, The

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** October 1899
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, Westminster.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
